text:
There was an old man named Eb. One day, Eb decided he wanted to learn to weave. He bought some wool and some shuttle blades. He didn't know anything about weaving.

Every day, Eb sat in his weaving tent. He spun wool into yarn.

One day a fox saw his weaving. Said, "Look inside."

Eb looked. Fox said, "That's ugly. It's a basket."

Eb was devastated.

Weeks later, a woman came through. Heard the basket.

"It's not ugly. It's lovely."

Eb made a basket. It was perfect.

The woman wanted one.

Years passed.

Eb died with a smile on his lips.

That's my story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
